items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
The small lucky bag has become a fashion staple for girls in recent years. Its elegant and simple style has won the love of people of all ages. The interior is made of tech nylon, which is lightweight and easy to clean. Even when carrying many items, it helps reduce the burden. The strap features a knot design, allowing for easy adjustment. It can be used as a handbag; after tightening the drawstring, it looks like a cloud bag, making it perfect for summer outfits. Dimensions: 21*16.6*1CM3005s

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
❤️【Lady Dio.r My ABC】"Grey Lambskin"
/5-Grid Lambskin/
This handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from fine lambskin with a signature herringbone stitching for quilting details, its elegant and classic design is timeless. Finished with matching enamel, lined with sheep suede, and featuring a chain shoulder strap with an internal zip pocket, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 24×20×11 cm

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
 The "SERPENTI CABOCHON" series mini shoulder bag features a distinctive large-scale graphic pattern and bold metallic texture details, radiating the brilliance of the SERPENTI world with a refined and practical unique design and modern style.
 This handbag is equipped with an adjustable and detachable leather shoulder strap, serving as a handbag or clutch to achieve versatile and matching functions, suitable for both day and night.
 Extra small, with one storage compartment and one card slot. Engraved BVLGARI brand logo on the interior metal plate.
 Model: 291085
 Dimensions: 18 X 12 X 8 cm

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
🆕SERPENTI FOREVER EAST-WEST Small Shoulder Bag❤
Crafted from pink calfskin, interpreting timeless elegance with a fashionable and avant-garde silhouette.
The piece features a practical leather shoulder strap adorned with the classic Serpenti head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection, suitable for daily wear. It includes a single compartment, a front pocket, a back patch pocket, an interior quilted pocket, three card slots, a customizable vanity mirror, and is accented with the BULGARI metal logo on the back.
Dimensions: 22 X 15 X 4.5 cm
Model: 292104

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️
Celine 23 Early Spring Lisa Style Mini Saddle Bag ~ Besace Arc de Triomphe
The real thing is truly beautiful, retro yet stylish, and goes well with any outfit! The curved bottom and flap design make it look younger. Compared to the mini version, the handle design is playful and cute. A style you'll fall in love with at first glance, exuding elegance when photographed. Can be worn crossbody, shoulder, or carried by hand!
Style: Retro, stylish, and cute~
Capacity: Doesn't fit large phones well, but can hold keys, tissues, compact powder, 💄
Model No.: 10L063 Pollen Yellow
Dimensions: 15.5-11.5-5 (with original packaging)

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
NEW IN l
Large Goya Silk Calfskin Handbag
7 Colors
Model 5608
Size 22.5-16.5-6.5
Goya is a structured compact bag, very well organized for its size. The clean Anagram closure and vibrant colors contrast sharply with its sharp graphic minimalism. It is handcrafted from exquisite silk calfskin with a soft Nappa sheepskin lining. It is a testament to exquisite craftsmanship and a new LOEWE product worth buying.
Shoulder carry
Adjustable strap
Magnetic closure
Four interior pockets, including a zip pocket and a snap pocket
One exterior pocket
Calfskin lining
Metal-embossed LOEWE logo on the strap

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
✈Goyard ♛ Card bag 🏷Essential for daily matching 💳
🔖G0YARD (Goyard) was founded in 1853 and has a history of over 160 years. The fabric is woven from a blend of linen, cotton, and hemp fibers, then coated with glossy shellac, making it waterproof, sturdy, and durable. Highly sought after by celebrities, royalty, and the aristocracy 🎉🎉
Uses exclusive wallet-matching custom glossy leather ✅Perfect diagonal stitching 🧵✅The yellow interior part is custom matching top-grain cowhide [⚠️Not PU leather ❌Not split leather ❌]

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
BVLGARI SERPENTI FOREVER Crossbody Bag
Model: 289676
Dimensions: 19-13-7cm
The new 'Serpenti Forever' crossbody bag highlights urban style and versatile fashion, adding a unique trendy touch to the Serpenti world.
This bag is made of peach-colored calfskin with light gold-plated brass hardware.
Black and white agate enamel and green malachite eyes add a seductive charm to the classic snake-head clasp.
Featuring an adjustable serpentine chain and leather shoulder strap for easy styling with daily outfits.
Small size, two compartments, a delicate customizable vanity mirror, a non-removable credit card holder, an open pocket, a zip pocket, and two external pockets.
